📍 @tapasakedubai at the One&One One Zaabeel
🍹 It’s a poolside restaurant and bar serving Nikkei cuisine and cocktails.
🏙️ Great views of Burj Khalifa and downtown skyscrapers. Visit during sunset for a more romantic atmosphere. 

Tapasake • Rooftop Bar • Dubai Lounge • Burj Khalifa view • Sunset view •
